p3.title: Assembler output not asserted deep-equal to published fixture/contract result
p3.finding: The assembler result was validated but not directly compared with the published fixture/contract result.
p3.recommendation: Fixed by adding the assembler matches published evidence test for CP00-080.

p3.title: command_evidence_ref validated only as nonblank string
p3.finding: The result validator did not pin command_evidence_ref to docs/closeout-packs/cp00-080/command-evidence.json.
p3.recommendation: Fixed by adding the exact command_evidence_ref expectation to the result validator.

p3.title: Assembler upstream boundary-field checks not independently test-covered
p3.finding: The CP00-080 assembler validates a strict CP00-079 result before redundant CP00-080 boundary checks, so override-based tests are caught upstream first.
p3.recommendation: Adjudicated as intentional defense-in-depth; the strict upstream validator and CP00-080 tests preserve fail-closed behavior without weakening the boundary.

notes: Single valid CP00-080 Claude Opus 4.8 max read-only review completed with PASS_WITH_FINDINGS and no P0/P1/P2 findings.
